summary: Comprehensive frontend-only UI test of Smart Scheduler Dashboard (mock-data). Verified TopBar, Sidebar, Overview, Hosts (with drawer tabs), CPU Config, Flavor Visibility (incl. heatmap), Pockets (carousel), and 4 Coming-Soon pages. 53/58 interactive testid checks passed. All 5 main pages render, all 4 coming-soon pages render, routing works, toasts/charts functional.

ui_bugs.issue: Spec requires data-testid='waitlist-openstack-dash' on the waitlist CTA button across all 4 coming-soon pages, but implementation uses slug-based testid 'waitlist-{slug}' (e.g. waitlist-aggregates, waitlist-vm-placement, waitlist-migration, waitlist-settings). The button itself works fine — only the testid name deviates from spec.

issues: Recharts logs ~10 console warnings: 'width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' on initial mount (ResponsiveContainer before parent is sized). Non-blocking, charts render correctly once sized. Consider adding minHeight/minWidth to ResponsiveContainer parents to silence.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Either (a) add a secondary data-testid='waitlist-openstack-dash' to the ComingSoon CTA so it satisfies both the review spec and current slug-based id, or (b) clarify whether slug-based ids are acceptable (current approach is more granular and useful for tests).
OPTIONAL: Silence Recharts width/height -1 warnings by giving ResponsiveContainer parents an explicit minHeight on first render.
critical_code_review_comments: Good: all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Good: state management via DashboardContext with auto-refresh tick works as designed.
Good: mock API in /app/frontend/src/lib/api.js adheres to shapes of real API and returns realistic data.
Minor: TopBar manual-refresh spinning state uses setTimeout(700ms) — this works but could be tied to actual data load rather than a fixed timer.

Minor: mockData.js seed-random-based hosts are deterministic across reloads (good for testing) but sparkline and health pings use Math.random() which breaks determinism; acceptable for UI but flag if deterministic snapshots are ever needed.
seed_data_creation: None required — app uses hardcoded mockData.js.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only app at https://openstack-dash.preview.emergentagent.com. All 9 routes render without errors. Observations: (1) spec listed waitlist-openstack-dash testid but code uses waitlist-{slug}; all 4 coming-soon pages were verified with slug-based id and work. (2) Recharts console warnings are expected on mount and non-blocking. (3) Host drawer opens on row click and all 3 tabs (summary/vms/cpu) visible. (4) Pockets carousel has 5 dots (pocket-dot-0..4), prev/next navigation works. (5) Visibility heatmap renders on view toggle. (6) Quick placement check works with m1.large and other flavors. (7) Health dots, auto-refresh toggle, manual-refresh all functional.
rca of the issue: No blocking issues. Only a spec deviation on one testid name which is cosmetic.
